generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/dtdf/vocab"
instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin environment containing all vehicle components",
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, VehicleSteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuationActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
]
instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDepthDataTransmitted
]
instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor measuring steering angle",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]
instance DepthCameraDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]
instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]
instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]
instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera
]
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]
instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel D435i Depth Camera",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDepthDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]
instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]
instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]
instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object positions and velocities",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]
instance DBSCANPointCloudClustering : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]
instance KalmanFilterObjectTracking : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]
instance ISO15622ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic for vehicle speed and distance management",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for processing LiDAR point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]
instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for object tracking using Kalman filter",
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]
instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC control logic execution",
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]
instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for AI processing and computer vision tasks",
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService, ACCComputationOffloadingService
]
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication between Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ControlPanelService
]
instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for scripting and data processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService
]
instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing components",
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]
instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]
instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for persistent storage of vehicle state and object track timeseries data",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization, saving, and reporting of vehicle state",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateReport, ObjectTracksVisualization
]
instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading for Adaptive Cruise Control processing",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control and management of the ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]
instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the environment based on sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides Environment3DVisualization
]
instance ControlPanelService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "User interface for interacting with the digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:provides UserInteractionInsight
]
instance RealTimeVehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time reports of vehicle speed, steering angle, and system status for monitoring and troubleshooting"
]
instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of object tracks and driving path for operator insights"
]
instance Environment3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D representation of the vehicle's surroundings for operator awareness"
]
instance UserInteractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time feedback and control options presented via the control panel"
]
instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic Cruise Control action adjusting vehicle speed and steering angle",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator-initiated remote control commands for vehicle operation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance MotorActuationActuator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor actuation via voltage commands"
]
instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle steering control"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC-generated desired speed commands, emergency braking signals, and remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, adjust desired speed) from the Digital Twin Entity to the Physical Twin Entity for actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity, with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms to ensure real-time coordination for safety-critical operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Four-tier architecture: Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (off-vehicle), User Entity (visualization/control), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for ACC system monitoring and control; also applicable during design (cyber-physical experimentation) and validation phases for compliance testing."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity limited to performance class I ACC (no road curvature capabilities) due to 1/10-scale vehicle constraints; clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms due to hardware limitations; no explicit verification/validation methods detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; latency requirements based on 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V (≤100 ms)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle's NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity on separate hardware, though specific hosting details (e.g., cloud vs. edge) are not provided."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC control functionality; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system implemented per ISO 15622; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed in the document."
]
